label: doi
description: DOI or publisher URL when available.

label: reaction_system
description: Reaction, process, or experimental system studied in the paper.

label: feedstock
description: Main reactant, raw material, or feedstock.

label: catalyst
description: Catalyst name, composition, or sample code.

label: reactor_type
description: Reactor type such as fixed bed, batch reactor, flow reactor, electrochemical cell, or membrane reactor.

label: temperature_c
description: Reaction temperature in Celsius. Use numeric values when possible.

label: pressure_mpa
description: Reaction pressure in MPa. Convert units when possible.

label: whsv
description: WHSV, GHSV, LHSV, space velocity, or residence-time related condition.

label: conversion_percent
description: Conversion percentage of the main feedstock.

label: selectivity_percent
description: Selectivity percentage for the target product.

label: yield_percent
description: Yield percentage for the target product.

label: notes
description: Short notes about uncertainty, table/figure source, or extraction caveats.
